ACT_SDS_001_021003_Expire_date_of_the_in.rationale: Directly reads expiry date from ink reservoir — expired result implicates expiry RCs

ACT_SDS_002_021004_Expire_state_of_the_i.rationale: Reads expiry state flag — same expiry RC cluster

ACT_SDS_003_021005_Ink_safe_mode_state_C.rationale: Safe mode activates specifically for non-genuine ink

ACT_SDS_004_021006_The_supported_ink_typ.rationale: Checks ink type compatibility — wrong type or non-genuine triggers unsupported

ACT_SDS_006_022102_Check_INK_LEAK_SE_02B.rationale: Leak sensor test — detects ink = leak or sensor fault

ACT_SDS_007_022103_Check_INK_x_HIGH_SE_C.rationale: High level sensor test — unexpected reading implicates sensor or wiring

ACT_SDS_008_022104_Check_INK_x_LOW_SE_C_.rationale: Low level sensor test — no ink detected could be sensor fault, wiring, or genuinely low

ACT_SDS_009_022105_Check_INK_x_CART_LOCK.rationale: Cart locked sensor test — inactive when should be active = sensor or connection

ACT_SDS_010_022106_Check_INK_x_CART_OPEN.rationale: Cart opened sensor test — same logic as locked sensor

ACT_SDS_011_024101_Activate_INK_x_REFILL.rationale: LED activation test — LED not responding = PBA or connection fault

ACT_SDS_012_024102_Activate_INK_x_CART_U.rationale: Solenoid activation test — not activating = PBA or connection fault

ACT_SDS_013_024103_Activate_RECIRC_VALVE.rationale: Recirculation valve hit test — not functioning = valve fault

ACT_SDS_014_024104_Activate_RECIRC_VALVE.rationale: Recirculation valve hold test — same valve cluster

ACT_SDS_020_026009_Recirculation_valve_W.rationale: White recirculation valve special test — not functioning = valve or blockage

ACT_SDS_021_026010_White_Ink_Recirculati.rationale: Full white ink recirculation test — failure implicates recirculation path

skipped.ACT_SDS_000_021001_Mark_ink_tube_as_empt: Parameter read (Full/Empty/Not Critical) — unclear which RCs this discriminates without domain input
skipped.ACT_SDS_005_021007_White_Ink_Hardware_In: Binary hardware presence check — only relevant if white ink option not installed, edge case
skipped.ACT_SDS_016_026002_Disable__Enable_ink_d: Toggle test, not diagnostic — enabling/disabling dosing doesn't point to specific RCs
skipped.ACT_SDS_022_028002_Number_of_inserted_ca: Counter read — high/low cartridge count doesn't map cleanly to specific failure RCs
